svg.title: Biza home dashboard and progress tracking UX
svg.desc: Home screen layout showing learning path, progress per course, and navigation

g.text: Based on your goals → Freelancing first
% complete on every course card. Never hidden.
Persona quiz output shapes home screen order.
Last chapter position saved. Resume instantly.
No points, no streaks, no leaderboard. Pure learning.
Checkmark + a punchy real line. No points gifted.
Home · Courses · Profile — nothing else at MVP.

svg.text: Progress data stored server-side — syncs across devices. PWA = offline reading of already-opened chapters.
